title: Bhānder Heat Wave
lead: Bhānder is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.34. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Bhānder has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 17.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 22%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 11.5 km/h. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no signs of significant relief in the near future.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
